title: AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 - Apply for Project Research Scientist II Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has released the latest job notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Project Research Scientist II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, BDS, MDS, MD/ MS, B.V.Sc, M.V.Sc, and Ph.D can use this chance and apply for the AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 . Here, we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these post...
